creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
Created attachment 152218
devel/godot new port in shar file

Godot is a recently released application that provides a gui IDE aimed at creating games. There is one binary file generated that includes the game engine and the IDE, optionally the IDE can be turned off, which only reduces the binary by less than 5MB. Games developed with godot can easily be deployed on a number of platforms, including ios, android, linux, osx, windows, html or ps3

I have placed it within devel as it is mostly a development IDE. It isn't a game itself, but will become a dependency for ports within games.
